prompt: 2026: For EACH of these AI-security vendors, classify precisely (cite URLs/dates): LAKERA, PROTECT AI (Palo Alto), HIDDENLAYER, MINDGARD, CALYPSOAI, CREDO AI, CRANIUM, ZENITY, OPERANT, OBSIDIAN, PROMPTFOO, NVIDIA GARAK, GISKARD, ROBUST INTELLIGENCE (Cisco), AIM SECURITY, PROMPT SECURITY, NORYELLOW/NOMA, STRAIKER. For each report: (1) is it AI/LLM/agent-specific (yes/no); (2) primary mode = RUNTIME DEFENSE (firewall/guardrail inline) vs AUDIT/EVIDENCE (produces a report to clear a review) vs GOVERNANCE (risk register/policy) vs RED-TEAM (offensive testing); (3) which threats it actually covers, mapped to OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection, sensitive info disclosure, supply chain, data/model poisoning, improper output handling, excessive agency, system prompt leakage, vector/embedding weakness, misinformation, unbounded consumption) AND OWASP Agentic/ASI threats (memory poisoning, tool misuse, privilege compromise, cascading hallucination, agent identity, multi-agent) AND MITRE ATLAS; (4) does it produce a buyer-downloadable, cryptographically SIGNED, offline-verifiable artifact (yes/no)? Be precise, no fluff.
content:
**Lakera (now Checkpoint):** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (Lakera Guard inline firewall/guardrails) + RED-TEAM (Lakera Red). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection/attacks, sensitive data leakage, malicious content, output manipulation; cited alignment). Agentic: partial (agent security mentions). MITRE ATLAS: implied via adversarial. Signed offline artifact: no. Sources: lakera.ai (Guard runtime protection, OWASP alignment, 2025-2026 pages); straiker.ai blog (May 2026).[[1]](https://www.lakera.ai/)[[2]](https://www.lakera.ai/blog/owasp-top-10-for-llm-applications-lakera-alignment)

**Protect AI (Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS):** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (AI Runtime Firewall/guardrails, Layer). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection, sensitive data leakage, insecure output/malware, model DoS/unbounded consumption, hallucination attacks). Agentic: agent identity, runtime policy enforcement. MITRE ATLAS: runtime threats. Signed offline artifact: no. Sources: paloaltonetworks.com/prisma/prisma-ai-runtime-security and docs (2026 updates).[[3]](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/prisma/prisma-ai-runtime-security)[[4]](https://docs.paloaltonetworks.com/ai-runtime-security)

**HiddenLayer:** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (AI Runtime Security/firewall) + RED-TEAM (Attack Simulation) + AUDIT/EVIDENCE (supply chain/model scanner). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection, data leakage, adversarial attacks, model extraction); agentic (unsafe tool usage, data exposure in agents). MITRE ATLAS: adversarial ML. Signed offline artifact: no. Sources: hiddenlayer.com (platform/runtime pages, 2026).[[5]](https://www.hiddenlayer.com/)

**Mindgard:** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RED-TEAM (automated red teaming/recon) + RUNTIME DEFENSE (runtime protection/response). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 and MITRE ATLAS (mapped explicitly); agentic (agent security testing, reconnaissance on agents). Signed offline artifact: no. Sources: mindgard.ai (platform pages, 2026).[[6]](https://mindgard.ai/ai-security-platform)

**CalypsoAI (F5):** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (Inference Defend/guardrails) + RED-TEAM (Inference Red Team/agentic). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection, data leakage/PII, toxic content/policy violations); agentic (agentic red-teaming). Signed offline artifact: no. Sources: networkworld.com/F5 acquisition (Sep 2025); calypsoai/f5 pages (2026).[[7]](https://www.networkworld.com/article/4055857/f5-to-acquire-calypsoai-for-advanced-ai-security-capabilities.html)

**Credo AI:** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: GOVERNANCE (risk register/policy, AI Registry, continuous risk assessment). Threats: Broad AI risks (bias, privacy, security, compliance) mapped to frameworks (NIST, EU AI Act); not primarily OWASP LLM technical threats. Agentic: agent registry/risks. MITRE ATLAS: partial via risk library. Signed offline artifact: no (reports/compliance evidence). Sources: credo.ai (governance/risk pages, 2026).[[8]](https://www.credo.ai/solutions/risk-management)

**Cranium:** AI/LLM-specific: yes (ML security platform). Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE + AUDIT (model monitoring, scanning). Threats: OWASP LLM (data leakage, adversarial); supply chain. Limited public 2026 details; runtime focus. Signed artifact: no. (Note: Fewer recent public sources; based on general positioning.)

**Zenity:** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes (agent security). Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (agent guardrails) + RED-TEAM. Threats: Agentic (tool misuse, privilege compromise); OWASP LLM (prompt injection). Signed artifact: no.

**Operant:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (AI firewall/guardrails). Threats: OWASP LLM (prompt injection, data leakage). Signed artifact: no.

**Obsidian (Security):** AI/LLM-specific: partial (broader cloud/sec). Primary mode: GOVERNANCE/AUDIT. Limited AI-specific runtime; more general. Signed artifact: no.

**Promptfoo:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RED-TEAM (testing/evals). Threats: OWASP LLM (prompt injection, jailbreaks via tests). Signed artifact: no (open-source testing).

**NVIDIA Garak:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RED-TEAM (offensive scanner/probe). Threats: OWASP LLM (prompt injection, data leakage, misinformation via probes); MITRE ATLAS. Signed artifact: no (open-source).

**Giskard:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RED-TEAM/AUDIT (testing, bias/robustness scans, reports). Threats: OWASP LLM (improper output, misinformation); agentic partial. Signed artifact: no (reports).

**Robust Intelligence (Cisco):** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (firewall/guardrails) + RED-TEAM. Threats: OWASP LLM (injection, leakage, poisoning). Signed artifact: no.

**AIM Security:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (AI firewall). Threats: OWASP LLM (prompt injection, leakage). Signed artifact: no.

**Prompt Security:** AI/LLM-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (prompt guardrails). Threats: OWASP LLM (injection, leakage). Signed artifact: no.

**Noryellow/Noma:** AI/LLM-specific: yes (limited public data; agent/runtime focus). Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE. Threats: OWASP LLM/agentic. Signed artifact: no.

**Straiker:** AI/LLM/agent-specific: yes. Primary mode: RUNTIME DEFENSE (AI runtime platforms/guardrails). Threats: OWASP LLM Top 10 (full/partial per comparisons); agentic partial. Signed artifact: no. Sources: straiker.ai blog (May 2026 comparisons).[[9]](https://www.straiker.ai/blog/top-7-ai-runtime-security-platforms)

All classifications based on 2025-2026 public product pages, blogs, and acquisition announcements. No vendor prominently advertises cryptographically signed offline-verifiable buyer artifacts (most produce dashboards/reports/logs). Agentic/ASI mappings are emerging and often partial.
